sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA='dbo'
AND TABLE_NAME =
REPLACE('@{pipeline().parameters.source_table}','dbo.','')

SELECT watermark_value
FROM watermark_table
WHERE table_name=
@{pipeline().parameters.TableName}

@if(
equals(pipeline().parameters.LoadType,'FULL'),

concat(
'SELECT * FROM dbo.',
pipeline().parameters.TableName
),

concat(
'SELECT * FROM dbo.',
pipeline().parameters.TableName,
' WHERE modified_date > ''',
activity('Lookup1').output.firstRow.watermark_value,
''''
)
)
